title: CRM Sales Target Board Issue

posts.author: pbmonday (Peter Breusch)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Q1 Actual formula field is incorrect in the CRM template. It adds Jun + Feb + Mar rather than Jan.

{*Jun - Actual}+{*Feb - Actual}+{*Mar - Actual}

Those using this template and this board or variations, please review that formula. The rest appear to be okay.
